title: No Cooldown Enchantment
description: Adds a enchantment that removes cooldown from weapons
body:
The "No Cooldown Enchantment" datapack removes the cooldown from any item, which means that the weapon can be used without a cooldown.

### Features

- Removes cooldown on all weapons  
- Enjoy a smoother experience  
- Designed to be lightweight and performance-friendly  

### Compatibility

- ✔️ Minecraft **1.21.x**
- ✔️ Compatible with most datapacks  
  
### How to Install

1. Download the datapack  
2. Move it to the `datapacks` directory in your world  
3. Reload the world or restart it  

### Notes

- This datapack removes the cooldown from weapons 
- May affect the balance of the game depending on usage
